zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary J Gilchrist於1613年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，她的父親Patrick Gilchrist26歲，母親Elspet Elizabeth Jamie23歲。她和Daniel M. de Ross II至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1714年9月12日在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年101歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary J Gilchrist于1613年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，她的父亲Patrick Gilchrist26岁，母亲Elspet Elizabeth Jamie23岁。她和Daniel M. de Ross II至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1714年9月12日在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年101岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。

nameMeanings.name: Gilchrist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Down): from Gaelic Mac Giolla Chríosd, Mac Gille Chríosd ‘son of the servant of Christ’.

variants.name: Kilcrease
meanings: History: Robert Kilcrease (c. 1750–1808) came from Scotland(probably Kilmarnock) to Edgefield, SC, c. 1770.

variants.name: Gilchrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilkerson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chrìosd ‘son of Gille Chrìosd' (see Gilchrist ).

variants.name: Gilkey
meanings: Irish (northern): possibly a pet form of the Scottishpersonal name   Gilchrist  .

variants.name: Gilcrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilcrease
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary J Gilchrist was born in 1613, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Patrick Gilchrist, was 26 and her mother, Elspet Elizabeth Jamie, was 23. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Daniel M. de Ross II. She died on 12 September 1714, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, at the age of 101, and was buried in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary J Gilchrist est née en 1613, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Patrick Gilchrist, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elspet Elizabeth Jamie, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Daniel M. de Ross II. Elle est décédée le 12 septembre 1714, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 101 ans, et a été enterrée à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary J Gilchrist 1613 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Patrick Gilchrist 26 und ihre Mutter Elspet Elizabeth Jamie 23. Sie hatte mit Daniel M. de Ross II mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. September 1714 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England und wurde in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary J Gilchrist è nata il nel 1613 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Patrick Gilchrist, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elspet Elizabeth Jamie, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Daniel M. de Ross II. Morì il 12 settembre 1714, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, all'età di 101 anni, e fu sepolta a Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary J Gilchristが1613年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Patrick Gilchristは26歳，母Elspet Elizabeth Jamieは23歳であった。彼女はDaniel M. de Ross IIとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1714年9月12日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで101歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary J Gilchrist(이)가 1613년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Patrick Gilchrist(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elspet Elizabeth Jamie(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Daniel M. de Ross II(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1714년 9월 12일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 101세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary J Gilchrist nasceu em 1613, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Patrick Gilchrist, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elspet Elizabeth Jamie, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Daniel M. de Ross II. Ela faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1714, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 101 anos, e foi sepultada em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary J Gilchrist родилась в 1613 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Patrick Gilchrist было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elspet Elizabeth Jamie, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Daniel M. de Ross II. Она умерла 12 сентября 1714 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 101 год и была похоронена в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия.
